feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: My power, my pleasure, MY PAIN!

entry.title: /g/ Technology: ANOTHER ONE BITES THE DUST
entry.content: https://www.engadget.com/2213731/on eplus-is-officially-leaving-the-us- and-europe/ >OnePlus and Oppo are jointly announcing that the former will no longer launch new devices in Europe and North America. The companies are framing it as a new "strategic focus" and wouldn't explicitly state where (or whether) OnePlus will continue to launch products. >Oppo says the decision will fold in OnePlus's capabilities, technologies, and product philosophy – OnePlus co-founder Peter Lau recently rejoined Op
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >What people are usually relying on for “blond” is a very specific adjective, wh…
entry.content: >What people are usually relying on for “blond” is a very specific adjective, which is xanthus in Greek, but it’s really hard to know. It’s very unlikely that the Greeks would do what we do, which is use a hair color as the epitome of a larger set of physical characteristics. Why should we assume that golden is a hair color rather than an aura? Why wouldn’t golden be something that’s describing a quality of character rather than a physical description? >the notion of the Greeks as blond really b
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /int/ International: >have completely different cultures from each other >conduct some of the most br…
entry.content: >have completely different cultures from each other >conduct some of the most brutal warfare in all of human history against each other >after the war the victorious country helps rebuild the losing country >become extremely close allies >even their peoples come to deeply admire parts of each other's cultures What other instances of international relationships in history have been like this?
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /b/ Random: Yesterday an anon made an interesting thread, lets have another go at it. To exp…
entry.content: Yesterday an anon made an interesting thread, lets have another go at it. To explain, you go to "https://postimg.cc slash user slash username" and find interesting pictures from public albums. Post your wins here then with what to expect. I'll start: >kira has a lot of AI lesbian edits >chloe random nude pics >jenny is weed products Hope you get the gist of it, as the anon said, it's not the worse way to spend your time

entry.title: /g/ Technology: is this a valid route
entry.content: Im studying CS right now (yeah i know shut up) and aside from all the doom and gloom around the job market and AI, i dont even know if i wanna work in my field anymore... I had a situation last semester where i was paired up with a guy in a project to write a filesystem and he kept pushing AI code without reviewing it just so he can hop on his game, i felt like a janitor and realized that i don't wanna do this for the rest of my life and that i don't really like working in a group. Im thinking o
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: I was't able to smoke weed for like a week cause we ran out of weed money, so i …
entry.content: I was't able to smoke weed for like a week cause we ran out of weed money, so i was on a 4 day t break, and then my grandma lended my mom some money for weed and i was finally able to smoke again, and now that my tolerance is a bit lower the weed's more potent again i am very happy :D
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I'm looking for songs that are upbeat on the surface but have dark themes, the i…
entry.content: I'm looking for songs that are upbeat on the surface but have dark themes, the inverse is welcome to, I just like songs that have such clashing elements My go to examples are Semi-Charmed Life, Pumped Up Kicks, and The Way by Fastball

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: You walk toward the town center of the MAID containment zone with your companion…
entry.content: You walk toward the town center of the MAID containment zone with your companion until night falls. The two of you go into an abandoned building to spend the night. Inside, you see a young man, barefoot (pic related) kneeling on the floor. He smells of pee and the floor underneath him is filthy. He says his companion got killed by one of the MAID cleanup crews, but they let him live. Now he cannot get into the town center because you're not allowed to enter without a companion. He has been roami
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #3019
entry.content: >Taste The Rainbow Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84140333/ >Scripts to check image metadata:

entry.title: /o/ Auto: /o/ Draw thread
entry.content: Not really a common thread here, but let's have a drawthread dedicated to cars and other vehicles. Draw full vehicles, parts, characters interacting with cars, roads and raceways, car memes, anything to do with car culture. You can be pro or just an MS Paint scribbler. Remember to enjoy yourself and have fun.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: IWTV - The Vampire Lestat
entry.content: The final episode of this shit leaked last night and I haven't seen anyone talking about it here. Insane how far it has fallen, I remember enjoying the first two seasons quite a lot. This season was a pain to sit through, however. Had a few good moments but it doesn't make up for the atrocious pacing, the "clever quips" that are obviously the writers getting high off their own farts and desperately trying to get a viral moment happening every 30 seconds, the off screening of interesting shit, ev
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Enough about hentai games. What about sentai games?
entry.content: Enough about hentai games. What about sentai games?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Favorite arcade?
entry.content: For me, it’s pic related. They put it in my local arcade right when the movie came out. Don't let it being a movie tie-in game fool you, it was developed by Sega and is a really solid lightgun shooter. It also captures the vibe of Jurassic Park surprisingly well, in part due to great sound design. The experience of getting inside that cabinet in a dark smoky room of the arcade, pulling those drapers behind you, and picking up the gun from the seat side-holster was too hype for my 7 year old brai
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /b/ Random: Why did i love murica in the 90s. Sigh.

entry.title: /int/ International: As an Arab I get some of the insults towards us like "cousin fuckers" or "inbred…
